siteTitle: FILL ME IN | Gay Coloring Book
heroLead: 32 illustrations by queer artists. Male bodies, desire, pride and kink — no hiding, no apologies. Color in your pride. Color in your desire. Color it your way.
coverCaption: Cover of FILL ME IN — gay coloring book for adults
feature1Title: From the community, for the community.
feature1Text: Every line drawn by a hand that gets it. Queer artists, queer perspective, queer desire.
feature2Text: Gazes that undress you. Hands that know where to touch. Men drawn with desire, not shame. Pride that doesn't hide and doesn't apologize — loud, colorful, unapologetic.
feature3Text: You put down the phone, pick up your colors, and give shape to what's been inside you all along. No audience, no judgment. Just you, the page, and a fantasy you finally don't have to hold back.
previewSubtitle: A few pages to whet your appetite. The rest waits inside — and it's worth it.
buyText: FILL ME IN — Gay coloring book for adults. 32 illustrations · 9 € · Coming June 25, 2026
cartNote: Pre-order ends June 25 · EU delivery 5–10 business days · International shipping available
